DP.147.0002:
Now, which hand is that Coin in?
My left or right?
DP.147.0004:
Bravo!
A winner is you!\f
For our winner, I have here...
A Coin Case!\f
DP.147.0005:
Me, I am but a tearful clown.
Though I smile, I cry inside.
DP.147.0006:
There are many magicians in the world.
You know, the performance artists?\f
Don’t you think, that maybe, say,
five percent are actually psychics?
